_metadata.description: Navico Demo Data — Marine Electronics Competitive Demo (D365 CS vs Salesforce)
_metadata.demoFocus: Omnichannel (Email, Chat, Voice), Intelligent Routing, Copilot Assist, RMA/Warranty Workflows
_metadata.caseContext: 52% Technical Support / 48% Warranty & Claims. B2B tier-driven routing + B2C consumer email/chat.

serviceAccounts._note: Brand-level manufacturer accounts (Navico group companies) + distributor/dealer accounts by tier.

accounts.name: Navico Group
accounts.description: Navico Group parent account — marine electronics portfolio including Lowrance, Simrad, B&G, C-MAP, Northstar.
Platinum Expert — largest east coast marine electronics distributor. High-volume Simrad + Lowrance. Key demo account for B2B voice scenario.

accounts.description: Platinum Expert EMEA — primary B&G and Simrad distributor serving UK and Northern Europe. Key demo account for live chat escalation scenario.

accounts.description: Platinum — Pacific Northwest multi-brand distributor. Primary Lowrance volume for recreational fishing market.

accounts.name: Nordic Marine Supply
accounts.description: Platinum EMEA — Scandinavian distributor for Simrad and B&G. Strong sailing and commercial marine segment.

accounts.name: Gulf Coast Marine Depot
accounts.description: Gold dealer — strong in recreational fishing and offshore boating. High Lowrance HDS volume.

accounts.name: Great Lakes Boating Supply
accounts.description: Gold dealer — recreational freshwater and sailing market. Lowrance + B&G mix.

accounts.name: Freshwater Fishing Depot
accounts.description: Standard dealer — recreational fishing focus. Lowrance entry-level units.

productSerials._note: Serial numbers for warranty lookup demo. Pattern: [BRAND]-[YEAR]-[MODEL]-[SEQ]. Used in case serial lookup flow.

--- B2C CONSUMER — Mike Torres (registered end user) ---

demoCases._note: Pre-seeded cases for demo environment. Mix of open/in-progress cases across channels and brands.

cases.title: Simrad NSX 3007 — Touchscreen Unresponsive After Firmware Update
cases.description: Jake Harrington reporting that Simrad NSX 3007 chartplotter (serial SIM-2024-NSX-10042) touchscreen became unresponsive following firmware update to v3.8.1. Unit was installed on commercial fishing vessel. Currently blocking navigation operations.
cases.demoUse: HERO — Voice screen pop demo. Shows B2B customer 360: account tier, open cases, serial history. Copilot suggests KB article for touchscreen recovery. Tech routes to Simrad Tier 4 specialist for RMA Exchange validation.

activities.subject: Inbound call — Jake Harrington re: NSX 3007 touchscreen failure
activities.description: Jake called in reporting touchscreen unresponsive after updating firmware to v3.8.1. Vessel is commercial fishing, unit is primary navigation. Urgent resolution needed. Serial SIM-2024-NSX-10042 confirmed. Case opened.

activities.subject: Tech pre-screening — firmware v3.8.1 known touchscreen issue
activities.description: Confirmed v3.8.1 has a known touchscreen freeze issue on NSX 3007 (internal ref: SIM-KB-2024-88). Recovery procedure: hold power 15s + factory reset via menu. If unsuccessful, RMA Exchange is the path. Escalating to Simrad Tier 4.

activities.subject: RE: Simrad NSX 3007 Touchscreen Issue — Case Reference NAV-2026-4412
activities.description:
Hi Jake,

Thank you for reaching out. We've reviewed your case and confirmed that firmware v3.8.1 has a known touchscreen freeze issue on the NSX 3007 series.

Please attempt the following recovery steps:
1. Hold the power button for 15 seconds to force a hard reset.
2. If the unit reboots and touchscreen remains unresponsive, navigate via the physical encoder knob to Settings > Factory Reset.

If these steps don't resolve the issue, we'll proceed with an RMA Exchange. Our Simrad Tier 4 specialist will follow up within 4 business hours.

Case: NAV-2026-4412 | Serial: SIM-2024-NSX-10042

Best regards,
Navico Technical Support

activities.subject: RE: Simrad NSX 3007 Touchscreen Issue — Case Reference NAV-2026-4412
activities.description:
Hi,

I tried both steps — the 15-second power hold rebooted the unit but the touchscreen is still completely unresponsive. I can use the encoder knob but the fishing fleet leaves port tomorrow at 0500. This unit is the primary navigation on the vessel and we can't operate without it.

I need an RMA Exchange as fast as possible. Can you send a replacement unit overnight?

Thanks,
Jake Harrington | Atlantic Marine Supply

activities.subject: Simrad Tier 4 — RMA Exchange approved, escalating to ERP
activities.description: Marco Rossi (Simrad Tier 4): Self-repair steps failed. Factory reset attempted, touchscreen still unresponsive. RMA Exchange approved under warranty. Replacement SIM-NSX-3007 unit reserved at Tulsa DC. ERP order submitted — overnight shipping authorized given commercial fleet urgency. Tracking to be provided to customer.

activities.subject: RMA Exchange Approved — Overnight Replacement Shipping | NAV-2026-4412
activities.description:
Hi Jake,

I have great news — your RMA Exchange has been approved and a replacement Simrad NSX 3007 is shipping to you overnight via FedEx Priority.

RMA Details:
- Case: NAV-2026-4412
- Serial Returned: SIM-2024-NSX-10042
- Replacement Serial: SIM-2024-NSX-10099
- Carrier: FedEx Priority Overnight
- Tracking: 7489234561829 (active by 6pm ET today)

Please print the prepaid return label attached and drop off the defective unit within 10 business days.

We apologize for the disruption to your fleet — our team has expedited this shipment given your operational timeline.

Best regards,
Marco Rossi | Navico Simrad Tier 4 Support

activities.subject: RE: RMA Exchange Approved — Overnight Replacement Shipping | NAV-2026-4412
activities.description:
Marco,

Unit arrived this morning — installed and operational before the fleet departed. Touchscreen fully functional. Crew is back underway.

Great support turnaround. Really appreciate the urgency you showed on this one.

Jake

activities.subject: Case resolved — replacement unit confirmed operational, ready to close
activities.description: Customer confirmed replacement SIM-2024-NSX-10099 installed and operational on vessel. Fleet departed on schedule. Defective unit SIM-2024-NSX-10042 return label sent — awaiting inbound. Case status: Resolved. NPS survey queued.

cases.title: B&G Triton2 — Wind Instrument Reading Incorrect Before Race Season
cases.description: Christine Delacroix (Euro Marine Distributors, Platinum Expert EMEA) reporting that B&G Triton2 wind instrument display (serial BG-2024-TRI2-20011) showing erratic apparent wind angle readings. Customer fleet is preparing for spring racing season — urgent resolution needed within 48 hours.
cases.demoUse: HERO — Live chat demo. Platinum Expert auto-escalates queue priority. Copilot surfaces B&G Triton2 calibration KB article instantly. Agent uses suggested reply. Case summary generated for escalation handoff to Marco.

activities.subject: Chat session context — customer portal initiated
activities.description: Customer initiated chat from Euro Marine distributor portal. Reported erratic apparent wind angle. Serial BG-2024-TRI2-20011 verified — fleet prep for spring regatta season. Platinum Expert priority auto-applied. Routing to B&G sailing specialist.

activities.subject: B&G Triton2 Wind Calibration — Service Case BG-2026-0211
activities.description:
Dear Christine,

Thank you for contacting Navico B&G Support. We've reviewed serial BG-2024-TRI2-20011 and have a calibration procedure that should resolve the apparent wind angle issue before your race season.

Please follow KB Article BG-KB-2024-44: B&G Triton2 Masthead Calibration Procedure. Key steps include verifying the masthead unit cable connections and running the auto-calibration sequence from the instrument menu.

Given the urgency ahead of your regatta schedule, our B&G sailing specialist will call you directly within 2 hours if the KB procedure doesn't fully resolve the issue.

Case Reference: BG-2026-0211

Best regards,
Navico B&G Support

activities.subject: RE: B&G Triton2 Wind Calibration — Service Case BG-2026-0211
activities.description:
Hello,

I followed the KB procedure and the calibration sequence ran successfully. Wind readings have improved significantly in light conditions but we're still seeing erratic values when apparent wind exceeds 15 knots — which is exactly the racing range we need to be accurate in.

The fleet begins regatta training in 3 days. Can your specialist take a look? Serial BG-2024-TRI2-20011.

Thank you,
Christine Delacroix | Euro Marine Distributors

activities.subject: Specialist escalation — masthead unit suspected, high-wind erratic reading
activities.description: Sophie Laurent (B&G Sailing Specialist): Reviewed calibration logs. Erratic reading above 15kts is consistent with a loose or partially failed masthead wind vane bearing — not a software issue. Likely needs masthead unit inspection or replacement. Arranged remote video call with Christine's rigger for tomorrow morning.

activities.subject: Outbound call — Sophie Laurent to Christine re: masthead video inspection
activities.description: Called Christine to walk through masthead unit inspection via video. Identified that wind vane bearing shows visible wear on starboard pivot. Confirmed masthead unit BG-MAST-VHF-20011 needs replacement. Coordinating with Euro Marine rigger for pre-regatta swap. Replacement unit shipping from Amsterdam depot.

activities.subject: B&G Masthead Unit Replacement Arranged — Case BG-2026-0211
activities.description:
Dear Christine,

Following our video inspection call, we've confirmed the masthead wind vane bearing requires replacement. We've arranged the following:

- Replacement masthead unit BG-MHU-ELITE ships from our Amsterdam depot today (tracking: DHL-98234-EU)
- Expected delivery: tomorrow before 10:00 AM
- Our technical document for rigger installation is attached

This should give your team a full day for installation and re-calibration ahead of regatta training. Sophie will be available by phone during the installation if your rigger has any questions.

Case Reference: BG-2026-0211

Best regards,
Sophie Laurent | Navico B&G Sailing Support

activities.subject: RE: B&G Masthead Unit Replacement Arranged — Case BG-2026-0211
activities.description:
Sophie,

Masthead unit delivered and installed this morning. Calibration sequence completed — wind readings are perfect across the full wind range including the 15-25 knot band that was causing problems.

Fleet training started this afternoon. Excellent support — your team really understood the urgency of a racing fleet's schedule. We'll be renewing our Platinum Expert agreement without question.

Many thanks,
Christine Delacroix

activities.subject: Case resolved — masthead unit replaced, fleet ready for regatta season
activities.description: Customer confirmed masthead replacement successful. Wind readings validated across full wind range. Fleet commenced regatta training on schedule. Customer expressed strong satisfaction and confirmed Platinum Expert renewal intent. NPS survey sent. Case: Resolved.

cases.title: Lowrance HDS-9 Live — Unit Not Powering On (Consumer Warranty Claim)
cases.description: Mike Torres (registered consumer) reporting that Lowrance HDS-9 Live fish finder/chartplotter (serial LWR-2024-HDS-88821) will not power on. Unit purchased 14 months ago and is within 3-year warranty. Attempted power cycle and checked fuse — no result.
cases.demoUse: HERO — Email AI triage demo. Intent = warranty claim, AI creates case, serial LWR-2024-HDS-88821 validated (warranty active). Copilot drafts consumer response with next steps. NPS survey queued on close.

activities.subject: My Lowrance HDS-9 won't turn on
activities.description: Hi, I bought a Lowrance HDS-9 Live about a year ago from Freshwater Fishing Depot. It completely stopped turning on this morning. I checked the fuse and it looks fine. I tried a power cycle but nothing happens. The unit is still under warranty I think. Can you help? Serial number is LWR-2024-HDS-88821. Thanks, Mike

activities.subject: RE: Your Navico Support Case — Warranty Claim #NAV-2026-4415
activities.description:
Hi Mike,

Thank you for contacting Navico Support. I've verified your product (Serial: LWR-2024-HDS-88821) is within the 3-year limited warranty (purchased Feb 2024, expires Feb 2027).

To proceed with your warranty claim:
1. A prepaid return shipping label will be emailed to you within 1 business hour.
2. Please pack the unit securely using the original packaging if available, and drop off at any UPS location.
3. You'll receive email tracking updates as your unit is received, diagnosed, and returned.

Target turnaround: 10 business days from receipt.

Case Reference: NAV-2026-4415

Best regards,
Navico Consumer Support

activities.subject: RE: Your Navico Support Case — Warranty Claim #NAV-2026-4415
activities.description:
Hi,

Thank you for the quick reply. I dropped the unit off at UPS this morning with the prepaid label. The UPS receipt shows tracking number 1Z999AA10123456784.

About how long until I hear something? I'm heading on a fishing trip in two weeks and was hoping to have it back by then.

Thanks,
Mike Torres

activities.subject: RE: Your Navico Support Case — Warranty Claim #NAV-2026-4415
activities.description:
Hi Mike,

We can see your shipment is in transit and expect to receive it tomorrow. Once received, our repair team typically completes diagnostics within 2 business days.

Given your two-week fishing trip timeline, you should be well within the window to have your unit back in time.

I'll send you an update email as soon as we receive the unit and begin diagnostics.

Case Reference: NAV-2026-4415

Best regards,
Navico Consumer Support

activities.subject: Unit received — diagnostics: failed internal power regulator, warranty replacement approved
activities.description: Repair center received LWR-2024-HDS-88821. Diagnostics: internal power regulation circuit failure (component failure, not user damage). Unit is within 3-year warranty. Replacement unit LWR-HDS9-LIVE approved. New unit pulled from stock and shipping today via UPS Ground. Estimated delivery: 3 business days.

activities.subject: Warranty Replacement Shipping — Navico Case #NAV-2026-4415
activities.description:
Hi Mike,

Great news! Our technicians completed diagnostics on your Lowrance HDS-9 Live and identified a failed internal power regulator — this is covered under your 3-year limited warranty.

We are shipping a brand new replacement unit to you today:
- Carrier: UPS Ground
- Tracking: 1Z999AA10987654321
- Estimated Delivery: 3 business days

The replacement unit ships with all original accessories. No action needed on the defective unit — we'll handle it on our end.

You should be all set well before your fishing trip!

Case Reference: NAV-2026-4415

Best regards,
Navico Consumer Support

activities.subject: RE: Warranty Replacement Shipping — Navico Case #NAV-2026-4415
activities.description:
Just got the new unit in the mail today — set it up and it's working perfectly. Really impressed with how smooth this whole process was. The prepaid label, the fast turnaround, the heads-up emails... made a frustrating situation really easy to deal with.

Thanks for the great service. I'll definitely be buying Lowrance again.

Mike

activities.subject: Case resolved — customer confirmed replacement working, NPS survey sent
activities.description: Customer confirmed replacement LWR-HDS9-LIVE received and operational. Expressed strong satisfaction with warranty process. Case closed — Resolved. NPS survey sent. Customer retention note: expressed brand loyalty and intent to repurchase.

cases.title: Simrad NSX 3009 — RMA Exchange Request (4 Units, Fleet Order)
cases.description: Atlantic Marine Supply requesting RMA Exchange on 4x Simrad NSX 3009 units from fleet order PO-AMS-8813. Units exhibit GPS lock failure in NMEA 2000 network configuration. Tech specialist Marco Rossi to validate before ERP submission.
cases.demoUse: SECONDARY — Shows RMA Exchange workflow. Tech validation gate, ERP submission note, multi-unit tracking.

activities.subject: RMA Exchange Request — 4x Simrad NSX 3009 (PO-AMS-8813)
activities.description:
Hi Navico Support,

We have 4 Simrad NSX 3009 units from fleet order PO-AMS-8813 that are all exhibiting GPS lock failure when connected to our NMEA 2000 network. Serial numbers: SIM-2024-NSX-10044, SIM-2024-NSX-10045, SIM-2024-NSX-10046, SIM-2024-NSX-10047.

We need to initiate an RMA Exchange. These are installed on commercial vessels — downtime is costly. Please advise on the exchange process and ETA for replacements.

Regards, Jake Harrington | Atlantic Marine Supply

activities.subject: Tech validation — GPS lock failure NMEA 2000 config issue confirmed
activities.description: Marco Rossi (Simrad Tier 4): Reviewed serial SIM-2024-NSX-10044 logs. GPS lock failure in NMEA 2000 network config is a known issue with firmware < v4.1. All 4 units confirmed affected. RMA Exchange approved — ERP submission prepared. Replacement units shipping from Tulsa DC.

cases.title: Lowrance HDS-12 Live — Sonar Module Failure (Repair RMA)
cases.description: Gulf Coast Marine Depot submitting repair RMA for Lowrance HDS-12 Live (serial LWR-2024-HDS-88500). Sonar module not detecting transducer signal. Unit within warranty. Customer requesting ship-to-repair-center option.
cases.demoUse: SECONDARY — Shows Repair RMA flow. Tracks inbound/repair/return stages. Connects to ERP for logistics.

activities.subject: Web form submission — Repair RMA initiated
activities.description: Dana Broussard submitted Repair RMA via web contact form. Sonar module not detecting transducer on Lowrance HDS-12 Live, serial LWR-2024-HDS-88500. Unit within 3yr warranty. Customer prefers ship-to-repair option over exchange. Case auto-created from web channel.

activities.subject: RE: Lowrance HDS-12 Live Repair RMA — Case #NAV-2026-4420
activities.description:
Hi Dana,

Thank you for submitting your repair request for the Lowrance HDS-12 Live (Serial: LWR-2024-HDS-88500). We've confirmed the unit is within warranty and have approved a Repair RMA.

Next steps:
1. A prepaid inbound shipping label is attached to this email.
2. Please ship the unit to our repair center in Tulsa, OK.
3. Once received, our technicians will diagnose and repair within 5 business days.
4. You'll receive tracking confirmation when your repaired unit ships back.

RMA Reference: NAV-2026-4420

Best regards,
Navico Repair Center

cases.demoUse: QUEUE — Shows case backlog in supervisor view. Demonstrates intelligent routing to C-MAP specialist.
